name: code-to-linkedin
description: Automatically generate a ranked LinkedIn Skills section from actual code contributions.

interface.shortDescription: Generate LinkedIn skills from your code.
interface.longDescription: Analyzes codebases and Git contributions to identify substantive technical and professional skills, normalize them for LinkedIn, rank what to feature, and exclude incidental repository technologies.
defaultPrompt: Generate my LinkedIn skills from my code contributions.
Rank the strongest skills demonstrated across my repositories.
Tell me which repository technologies belong on LinkedIn.
